note: National context — not route-specific. Narrative backdrop only; never sliced per route.
source: data.gov.sg (Singapore Open Data Licence). Some series (Retail Sales Index, F&B Services Index) pending re-source — dataset IDs re-issued and the discovery API is access-gated.

indices.label: Mobile penetration rate
indices.read: Above 150% — the O2O / mobile-retarget rationale for pairing transit OOH with mobile.
